  llvm::PPC::PRED_GT = (1 << 5) | 12 , llvm::PPC::PRED_NE = (2 << 5) | 4 , llvm::PPC::PRED_UN = (3 << 5) | 12 , llvm::PPC::PRED_NU = (3 << 5) | 4 ,

 Predicate - These are "(BI << 5) | BO" for various predicates. More...
